Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly opens this file path in the ProjectLibre application.

Contradicted by counting <Task> tags in the actual loaded file (assets/sample_project.xml). The setup script fails to execute create_sample_project.py, meaning the intended 16-task synthetic project is never created.

Contradicted. This expectation relies on the missing synthetic data ('Requirements Gathering', etc.). The actual loaded 'Commercial Construction' project has completely different tasks and critical paths.

Contradicted. This expectation relies on the missing synthetic data ('Requirements Gathering', etc.). The actual loaded 'Commercial Construction' project has completely different tasks and critical paths.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions and verifier expect an 'Enterprise Software Development Project' with exactly 16 tasks and specific software engineering task names (like 'Requirements Gathering'). However, the setup script (setup_task.sh) fails to execute the synthetic data generator (create_sample_project.py). Instead, it loads a default 'Commercial Construction' template containing 146 tasks. Therefore, the task expectations regarding task count and specific critical/non-critical tasks are completely contradicted by the actual data provided to the agent in the environment.
